description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named fpp-to-json Test that runs on push to devel and release branches and on pull requests to those branches, excluding certain paths. The workflow should cancel in-progress runs if a newer run is started on a given PR, except for devel and release branches. Use an ubuntu-22.04 job to check out the repository with submodules, set up the environment, generate a Ref deployment, and run fpp-to-json on the Ref topology.
